idea: TILE_K=32 STAGES=5: halve K-tile to 32 (2 WGMMAs/stage), increase stages to 5 so producer is 4 stages=1536 cycles ahead. TMA latency ~300-400 cycles < 1536 → should eliminate barrier stalls that now dominate at 41% of cycles. SMEM: 5*(64*32*2+256*32*2)+64*256*4=5*(4096+16384)+65536=100KB+65KB=165KB<228KB
expected_gain: +20-40 TFLOPS from eliminating 41% barrier stall overhead
